falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above 10% of the current support level defined in bottom_2024_aug pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above key support would invalidate the 'hold' signal by indicating a potential trend reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% of 30-day average volume within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would contradict the 'hold' signal by showing clear market conviction in a direction

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 70+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would directly contradict the current 'hold' signal by indicating imminent extreme price movement

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
